overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the sunlit Mediterranean-style city of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character traverses narrow cobblestone streets, open plazas with mountain views, covered corridors, and waterfront promenades while NPCs go about their daily activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with yellow stucco buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow street, passing by a seated NPC on a stone bench

notable_agents.action: sitting on a stone bench beside the yellow building

entered.detail: bright yellow building with white balconies and green ivy
stone bench with an NPC sitting on it
red flowering plants in planters along the building facade
irregular cobblestone paving stones forming the street surface
stone archway bridge crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, sunlit cobblestone street lined with yellow stucco buildings featuring white balconies and red flowers. An NPC sits on a stone bench to the left as the character approaches a stone archway tunnel in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill cobblestone street approaching open plaza

events.description: street opens up revealing distant mountain view and red stucco buildings

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the cobblestone street, approaching the plaza area

entered.detail: tall stone building with multiple windows and weathered facade
distinctive red building with arched windows visible in the distance
snow-capped mountain peak visible above the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The street widens as the character ascends the hill, transitioning from the yellow buildings to gray stone architecture. The red building and a snow-capped mountain become visible in the distance as the character approaches the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with pergola and waterfront terrace overlooking lake

events.description: enters open plaza with red building and mountain backdrop
character stops at overlook then turns around

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza to the waterfront overlook, pausing to look at the view, then turning back toward the red building

notable_agents.action: walking through the plaza wearing a green dress and hat

entered.detail: wooden pergola covered with green vines providing partial shade
calm blue lake water visible beyond the terrace railing
stone balustrade along the edge of the terrace overlooking the water
large planters with bright pink and red flowers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bright open plaza with the red building now prominent on the left. A wooden pergola stands in the center as the character walks to the terrace edge, pausing to look at the lake and mountain view before turning back. NPCs stroll through the plaza in period clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor through red building transitioning to side path

events.description: enters dark covered corridor with red walls and stone columns
exits corridor to outdoor waterfront path with lake view

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark covered corridor of the red building, then exiting to a narrow path along the water

entered.detail: dark covered walkway with arched ceilings through the red building
decorative stone fountain with basin in the corridor courtyard
interior walls of the corridor painted deep red with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, covered corridor through the red building, passing a stone fountain in the dimly lit interior. After walking through the archway, the character exits back to daylight onto a narrow path running alongside the building with the lake visible again.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with stone railing overlooking lake

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing NPCs and an exterior staircase

notable_agents.action: descending exterior wooden staircase wearing red and gold dress
walking along the promenade in blue and yellow tunic

entered.detail: wooden exterior staircase attached to the red building
ornate stone railing along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sunlit waterfront promenade with the lake and mountains visible to the right. The red building runs along the left side with an exterior wooden staircase. NPCs in period clothing walk in both directions along the stone-paved path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Mediterranean city, transitioning from narrow residential streets into a grand open plaza and finally along a scenic waterfront. It begins by following the character through a narrow cobblestone street lined with yellow stucco buildings and red flowers, moving steadily toward a distant stone archway. As the character ascends a hill, the yellow facades give way to gray stone architecture and the view expands to reveal a prominent red building and snow-capped mountains in the distance. The scene then opens into a bright plaza with a central wooden pergola and strolling NPCs, where the character pauses at a terrace edge to overlook a lake before entering a dimly lit, covered corridor. After passing a stone fountain in the shadows, the camera emerges back into the daylight to follow the character along a sunlit waterfront promenade, flanked by the red building's wooden staircase on one side and the lake and mountains on the other.
